title: Eco N Time
description: Exploring loss and search for belonging.
lyrics: You feel it too How about the description of you? Learn, don't you? Feel it all Feel your world I'm running around My energy, my energy, yeah Echo Just an echo Just an echo in time Just an echo in life Just an echo Just an echo in time I thought I told you once I would be there Why you look at me with a dead stare When you think that I'm leaving Cause you told me to go home Where should I go when I can't go home Where should I go when I'm lost and I run With a gun, with a gun and I can't get lost I get in with the money, get the cops and I'm bought Just an echo of imagination Just a moment of a reflection All the good that you do, don't go nowhere All the good that you go, go, go, sugar, where it go? In this time of times Just an echo out in time Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh I mean I'm moving to the next night Go With a gun Go Go With a gun I'm sorry to say goodbye to you I'm sorry to say goodbye to me Yeah, you ain't gonna make it with 10 bucks in my mind I know it's late when you cry Thanks for watching! Thanks for watching! Thanks for watching!

lyricsSegments.text: How about the description of you?
I thought I told you once I would be there
Why you look at me with a dead stare
When you think that I'm leaving
Cause you told me to go home
Where should I go when I can't go home
Where should I go when I'm lost and I run
With a gun, with a gun and I can't get lost
I get in with the money, get the cops and I'm bought
Just a moment of a reflection
All the good that you do, don't go nowhere
All the good that you go, go, go, sugar, where it go?
Just an echo out in time
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
I mean I'm moving to the next night
I'm sorry to say goodbye to you
I'm sorry to say goodbye to me
Yeah, you ain't gonna make it with 10 bucks in my mind
I know it's late when you cry
